# 1.3 Committee DTOs & DOs

Part of [Component 1 — repcheck-shared-models](../01-SHARED-MODELS.md)

**Data sources:** Senate XML (`senate.gov/legislative/LIS_MEMBER/cvc_member_data.xml`), House XML (`clerk.house.gov/xml/lists/memberdata.xml`), Congress.gov API (`/bill/{congress}/{billType}/{billNumber}/committees`). Committee membership must refresh on same cycle as bill metadata to ensure consistent attribution.

### Senate Committee XML Source DTOs

| Class | Fields | Source |
|-------|--------|--------|
| `SenatorCommitteeDataXmlDTO` | lisMemberId, bioguideId, firstName, lastName, party, state, stateRank, office, leadershipPosition, committees: List[SenatorCommitteeAssignmentXmlDTO] | `<senator>` element |
| `SenatorCommitteeAssignmentXmlDTO` | committeeCode, committeeName, position (Chairman, Ranking, Vice Chairman, Member) | `<committee>` nested in `<committees>` |

### House Committee XML Source DTOs

| Class | Fields | Source |
|-------|--------|--------|
| `HouseMemberDataXmlDTO` | bioguideId, firstName, lastName, party, state, district, committees: List[HouseCommitteeAssignmentXmlDTO] | `<member>` element |
| `HouseCommitteeAssignmentXmlDTO` | committeeCode, committeeName, rank, side (majority/minority) | `<committee>` nested in member |

### Congress.gov Committee DTOs

| Class | Fields | Source |
|-------|--------|--------|
| `CommitteeListItemDTO` | chamber, committeeTypeCode, name, systemCode, updateDate, url, parent, subcommittees | `Committees` schema |
| `CommitteeDetailDTO` | systemCode, type, isCurrent, history, bills (count + url), reports (count + url), subcommittees | `CommitteeDetail` schema |
| `BillCommitteeReferralDTO` | committeeCode, committeeName, chamber, activities: List[CommitteeActivityDTO] | `/bill/.../committees` response |
| `CommitteeActivityDTO` | name (e.g., "Referred to", "Reported by"), date | Activity on bill-committee relationship |

### Committee DOs

| Class | Table | Key Columns |
|-------|-------|-------------|
| `CommitteeDO` | `committees` | committeeCode (PK, e.g., "SSFI00", "hspw00"), name, chamber, committeeType (Standing, Special, Select, Joint, Subcommittee), parentCommitteeCode (nullable FK), isCurrent, updateDate, createdAt, updatedAt |
| `CommitteeMemberDO` | `committee_members` | committeeCode (FK), memberId (FK), position (Chairman, Ranking Member, Vice Chairman, Member), side (Majority, Minority), rank (Int), beginDate, endDate (nullable), congress, createdAt, updatedAt |
| `BillCommitteeReferralDO` | `bill_committee_referrals` | billId (FK), committeeCode (FK), referralDate, reportDate (nullable), activity, createdAt |

**Temporal membership query for attribution:**
```sql
SELECT cm.member_id, cm.position
FROM committee_members cm
JOIN bill_committee_referrals bcr ON cm.committee_code = bcr.committee_code
WHERE bcr.bill_id = ?
  AND cm.begin_date <= bcr.report_date
  AND (cm.end_date IS NULL OR cm.end_date >= bcr.referral_date)
```
Returns all members who served during the referral-to-report window, not just current roster.

### Conversion Methods

| Source | Produces | Notes |
|--------|----------|-------|
| `SenatorCommitteeDataXmlDTO.toMemberCommittees` | `List[CommitteeMemberDO]` | One DO per committee assignment; may be empty. |
| `SenatorCommitteeDataXmlDTO.toLisMemberMapping` | `Option[LisMemberMappingDO]` | Supplementary LIS-to-bioguide mapping when both `lisMemberId` and `bioguideId` present; primary source is `senator-lookup.xml` (§1.1). |
| `HouseMemberDataXmlDTO.toMemberCommittees` | `List[CommitteeMemberDO]` | One DO per committee assignment. |
| `CommitteeListItemDTO.toDO` | `Either[String, CommitteeDO]` | Committee master data. |
| `BillCommitteeReferralDTO.toDO` | `Either[String, BillCommitteeReferralDO]` | Bill-to-committee link with activity and dates. |

### Acceptance Criteria

**Functional:**
1. `SenatorCommitteeDataXmlDTO` parses all fields from `<senator>` including nested `<committees>`.
2. `HouseMemberDataXmlDTO` parses all fields from `<member>` including nested committee assignments.
3. `CommitteeDO` fields match `committees` table; `parentCommitteeCode` is `Option[String]` for subcommittees.
4. `CommitteeMemberDO` tracks temporal membership: `beginDate` (required), `endDate` (`Option[Date]`, `None` = currently serving).
5. `CommitteeMemberDO` has `congress` field to scope membership to a Congress session.
6. `BillCommitteeReferralDO` tracks `referralDate` (required), `reportDate` (`Option[Date]`, `None` = still in committee).
7. `SenatorCommitteeDataXmlDTO.toMemberCommittees` produces one `CommitteeMemberDO` per assignment.
8. `SenatorCommitteeDataXmlDTO.toLisMemberMapping` produces `Option[LisMemberMappingDO]` when both `lisMemberId` and `bioguideId` present; `None` otherwise. Primary source is `senator-lookup.xml`.
9. All committee DOs have Doobie auto-derived `Read` and `Write` instances.
10. `CommitteeListItemDTO.toDO` maps Congress.gov `systemCode` to `committeeCode` directly.
11. `BillCommitteeReferralDTO.toDO` extracts `referralDate` from earliest "Referred to" activity and `reportDate` from earliest "Reported by" activity (if present).

**Error Handling:**
12. XML DTO parsers return `Either[String, DTO]` with descriptive messages when required elements missing.
13. `toDO` conversions return `Left` with specific field and reason on validation failure.

**Test Requirements:**
14. Unit test per Senate XML DTO with sample fragment from `cvc_member_data.xml` — verify all fields including nested committees.
15. Unit test per House XML DTO with sample fragment from `memberdata.xml` — verify all fields.
16. Unit test `SenatorCommitteeDataXmlDTO.toMemberCommittees` — verify correct number of records produced.
17. Unit test `SenatorCommitteeDataXmlDTO.toLisMemberMapping` — verify `Some(LisMemberMappingDO)` when both IDs present.
18. Unit test `SenatorCommitteeDataXmlDTO.toLisMemberMapping` — verify `None` when `lisMemberId` missing.
19. Unit test temporal membership query — two members with overlapping ranges, verify correct members returned for referral window.
20. Unit test `BillCommitteeReferralDTO.toDO` — verify `referralDate` and `reportDate` extraction from activities.
21. Round-trip Doobie `Read`/`Write` test for `CommitteeDO`, `CommitteeMemberDO`, `BillCommitteeReferralDO`.
